description: Style NoteA basic top to pep up your training sessions or to layer under a tee, this brown top from femella has a unique style quotient while the soft blended fabric will keep you in exemplary comfort all day. Wear it with form fitting denims and style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes.Product DetailsBrown spaghetti strap top, has thin adjustable shoulder straps and a straight necklineMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash with like coloursDo not bleach or wringDry inside outUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") wears a size M
